title: Mixboard
abstract: Mixboard may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platforms. Google Labs 推出的 AI 无限画布工具
abstract_zh: Mixboard 就像你的私人调酒师，但不是调鸡尾酒，而是调 AI 画面。在这个AI大混战的时代，Google Labs 出来个无限画布，专治各种设计烦恼。你只需动动手，剩下的交给 Mixboard，让创意飞得更高更远！
